translations.en: The nurse is arriving in five minutes.
translations.es: El enfermero llega en cinco minutos.
translations.de: Der Krankenpfleger kommt in fünf Minuten.
translations.pt: O enfermeiro chega em cinco minutos.
translations.vi: Điều dưỡng sẽ đến trong năm phút nữa.
translations.nl: De verpleger komt over vijf minuten.
translations.hu: Az ápoló öt perc múlva megérkezik.
translations.el: Ο νοσηλευτής θα έρθει σε πέντε λεπτά.
translations.id: Perawat akan tiba dalam lima menit.
translations.ro: Asistentul medical sosește în cinci minute.
translations.cs: Zdravotní bratr dorazí za pět minut.
translations.ja: 看護師は5分後に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article 'le' elided before a vowel; masculine singular, introduces a specific noun.
Masculine singular common noun meaning 'nurse' (male).
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive; subject is 'L'infirmier'.
Preposition introducing a time interval ('in ...').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'minutes'.
Plural count noun; complement of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Je parle avec un infirmier demain matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə paʁl a.vɛk œ̃ ɛ̃.fiʁ.mje də.mɛ̃ ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je parle avec un infirmier demain matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə paʁl a.vɛk œ̃ ɛ̃.fiʁ.mje də.mɛ̃ ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: I'm talking with a nurse tomorrow morning.
translations.es: Mañana por la mañana voy a hablar con un enfermero.
translations.de: Morgen früh spreche ich mit einem Krankenpfleger.
translations.it: Domani mattina parlo con un infermiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天早上我要和一名护士谈话。
translations.yue: 聽日朝早我會同一位護士傾偈。
translations.ru: Завтра утром я поговорю с медбратом.
translations.pt: Amanhã de manhã vou falar com um enfermeiro.
translations.vi: Sáng mai tôi sẽ nói chuyện với một điều dưỡng.
translations.nl: Morgenochtend praat ik met een verpleger.
translations.uk: Завтра вранці я поговорю з медбратом.
translations.hi: मैं कल सुबह एक नर्स से बात करूँगा।
translations.el: Αύριο το πρωί θα μιλήσω με έναν νοσηλευτή.
translations.nb: I morgen tidlig skal jeg snakke med en sykepleier.
translations.id: Besok pagi saya akan berbicara dengan seorang perawat.
translations.sv: I morgon bitti ska jag prata med en sjuksköterska.
translations.ro: Mâine dimineață voi vorbi cu un asistent medical.
translations.cs: Zítra ráno si promluvím se zdravotním bratrem.
translations.da: I morgen tidlig skal jeg tale med en sygeplejer.
translations.ja: 明日の朝、看護師と話します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes a comitative complement with 'avec'.
Preposition introducing the comitative complement.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing a non-specific noun.
Masculine singular common noun; object of 'avec'.
Temporal adverb specifying future time.
Temporal noun used in a time expression ('demain matin').

sentences.target: L'infirmier de nuit est là ce soir.
sentences.reading: /l‿ɛ̃.fiʁ.mje də nɥi ɛ la sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: L'infirmier de nuit est là ce soir.
translations.ipa: /l‿ɛ̃.fiʁ.mje də nɥi ɛ la sə swaʁ/
translations.en: The night nurse is here tonight.
translations.es: El enfermero de noche está aquí esta noche.
translations.de: Der Nachtpfleger ist heute Nacht hier.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 야간 간호사가 여기 있어요.
translations.pt: O enfermeiro noturno está aqui esta noite.
translations.vi: Điều dưỡng trực đêm có mặt ở đây đêm nay.
translations.hu: Az éjszakás ápoló ma éjjel itt van.
translations.hi: आज रात नाइट ड्यूटी वाला पुरुष नर्स यहाँ है.
translations.pl: Nocny pielęgniarz jest tu dziś w nocy.
translations.el: Ο νοσηλευτής της νύχτας είναι εδώ απόψε.
translations.id: Perawat malam ada di sini malam ini.
translations.ro: Asistentul medical de noapte este aici în această noapte.
translations.cs: Noční zdravotní bratr je tu dnes v noci.
translations.ja: 夜勤の看護師は今夜ここにいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article 'le' elided before a vowel; masculine singular.
Masculine singular common noun; head of the subject NP.
Preposition introducing a nominal modifier ('de nuit' = 'night duty').
Common noun; complements 'de' to specify the shift.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicative 'là'.
Locative adverb functioning as the predicate with the copula.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' in the time expression.
Common noun; forms a temporal NP ('ce soir') functioning as an adverbial.

translations.en: We are waiting for the nurse at reception.
translations.es: Estamos esperando al enfermero en recepción.
translations.de: Wir warten am Empfang auf den Krankenpfleger.
translations.yue: 我哋喺接待處等緊護士。
translations.ru: Мы ждем медбрата у стойки регистрации.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando o enfermeiro na recepção.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi điều dưỡng ở quầy lễ tân.
translations.nl: We wachten bij de receptie op de verpleger.
translations.hi: हम रिसेप्शन पर नर्स का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi venter på sykepleieren i resepsjonen.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på sjuksköterskan i receptionen.
translations.cs: Čekáme na zdravotního bratra na recepci.
translations.da: Vi venter på sygeplejeren i receptionen.
translations.ja: 私たちは受付で看護師を待っています.

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive, takes a direct object.
Definite article 'le' elided before a vowel; marks a specific direct object.
Masculine singular common noun; direct object of 'attendons'.

Masculine singular common noun meaning 'reception desk'; object of the preposition 'à'.
